entries.claim_text: LayerSkip: Enabling Early Exit Inference and Self-Speculative Decoding
entries.quoted_snippet: \System: Enabling Early Exit Inference and Self-Speculative Decoding

entries.claim_text: ACL 2024 (Volume 1: Long Papers)
entries.quoted_snippet: Proceedings of the 62nd Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics (Volume 1: Long Papers)
ACL 2024

entries.claim_text: Mostafa Elhoushi, Akshat Shrivastava, Diana Liskovich, Basil Hosmer, Bram Wasti, Liangzhen Lai, Anas Mahmoud, Bilge Acun, Saurabh Agrawal, Ahmed Roman, Ahmed A Aly, Beidi Chen, Carole-Jean Wu
entries.quoted_snippet: \author[1,\dagger,*]{Mostafa Elhoushi}

entries.claim_text: https://github.com/facebookresearch/LayerSkip
entries.quoted_snippet: \metadata[Code] {\url{https://github.com/facebookresearch/LayerSkip}}

entries.claim_text: paper
entries.quoted_snippet: Proceedings of the 62nd Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics

entries.claim_text: Overview of the end-to-end LayerSkip solution showing its 3 components.
entries.quoted_snippet: Overview of our end-to-end solution, \System, showing its 3 components.

entries.claim_text: Train once with layer dropout and early exit loss to create a model equivalent to an ensemble of models of various depths.
entries.quoted_snippet: create a model that is equivalent to an ensemble of models of various depths

entries.claim_text: Comparison between autoregressive decoding, speculative decoding, and self-speculative decoding.
entries.quoted_snippet: Comparison between autoregressive decoding, speculative decoding, and our proposed self-speculative decoding.

entries.claim_text: 平均一個 token 只需要 23.45 層
entries.quoted_snippet: a token requires 23.45 layers out of the model's 32 layers

entries.claim_text: 不新增任何 auxiliary layer 或額外草稿模型
entries.quoted_snippet: we do not introduce any additional modules or linear layers for early exit, and instead used a shared exit for all layers

entries.claim_text: 第一個修改是把 dropout 加到
entries.quoted_snippet: The first modification we apply to common training recipes, is to apply layer dropout

entries.claim_text: 淺層近乎不 drop、深層幾乎必 drop
entries.quoted_snippet: increase dropout rate exponentially across layers from 0.0 in layer 0, to 1.0 in last layer

entries.claim_text: D(l) = e^{\frac{l\text{ln}2}{L-1}} - 1
entries.quoted_snippet: D(l) = e^{\frac{l\text{ln}2}{L-1}} - 1

entries.claim_text: 從零預訓練時，指數型時間 curriculum
entries.quoted_snippet: for pretraining from scratch, we found that an exponential curriculum

entries.claim_text: 把每一層的輸出都接到同一顆 LM head
entries.quoted_snippet: we augment layer dropout with early exit loss at each layer

entries.claim_text: J(X,Y,t) = \sum_{l=0}^{l=L-1} \tilde{e}(t,l)J_{\text{CE}}(g(x_{l+1}),Y)
entries.quoted_snippet: J(X,Y,t) = \sum_{l=0}^{l=L-1} \tilde{e}(t,l)J_{\text{CE}}(g(x_{l+1}),Y)

entries.claim_text: 那會拖慢訓練並傷到最後一層準確度
entries.quoted_snippet: adding early exit loss of all layers at all iterations during training slows down training and reduces the accuracy of the last layer

entries.claim_text: 而是全層共享同一顆 LM head
entries.quoted_snippet: we chose to have a shared LM head for all transformer layers in the model

entries.claim_text: 只跑前 $E$ 層，直接把 $g(x_E)$ 當作模型輸出
entries.quoted_snippet: we run the first $E$ transformer layers in a model, and skip to the model's LM head

entries.claim_text: 只存下第 $E-1$ 層的 query 向量
entries.quoted_snippet: saves the query vector of exit layer $E-1$

entries.claim_text: 在 TOPv2 語意剖析資料上以 LayerSkip 微調
entries.quoted_snippet: finetune on TOPv2~\citet{TOPv2}, a multi-domain task-oriented compositional semantic parsing dataset

entries.claim_text: Self Speculative | 6 | 82.9% | 76.0% | 18 | 2.0×
entries.quoted_snippet: Self Speculative & 6 & 82.9\% & 76.0\% & 18 & \textbf{2.0$\times$}

entries.claim_text: 最終 EM 回到 82.9%，而每 token 平均時間降到 18 ms，換算 2.0× 加速
CNN/DM 明顯更快（1.81× vs. 1.5×）
entries.quoted_snippet: we are significantly faster on CNN/DM (1.81$\times$ vs. 1.5$\times$) and slightly slower on XSUM (1.34$\times$ vs. 1.48$\times$)

entries.claim_text: 既有模型平均要 23.45/32 層，完美預測器頂多省 26%
entries.quoted_snippet: even if we have a perfect predictor that has zero compute overhead, we can only save up to 26\% of computation

entries.claim_text: ROUGE-2／EM 幾乎與自迴歸持平（例如 TOPv2 的 82.9% vs. 85.9%）
entries.quoted_snippet: We show speedup of upto 1.82$\times$ with no accuracy drop

entries.claim_text: 把一個回歸轉述成「未來工作的動機」，讀來有淡化既有缺點之嫌
entries.quoted_snippet: we notice a larger drop in last layer accuracy when continually pretraining with \System, despite training on more tokens

entries.claim_text: 使得 headline 數字有被最有利設定放大的空間
entries.quoted_snippet: slightly slower on XSUM (1.34$\times$ vs. 1.48$\times$)

entries.claim_text: 相較跳中間層的 Draft & Verify 是實質的機制差異，不只是換名詞
entries.quoted_snippet: can reuse the activation and KV cache from the draft stage as both stages execute the same early layers in the same order

entries.claim_text: 屬於「對願意付出訓練成本者成立」的加速方案
entries.quoted_snippet: The solution achieves speedups between 1.34$\times$ and $2.16\times$ depending on the task
